title: Wilson 2 Player Badminton Set, Complete Kit with Rackets, Shuttlecocks and Carrying Bag
features: COMPLETE SET: Professional badminton kit includes 2 rackets, shuttlecocks, and a convenient carrying bag for easy transport and storage
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Sturdy steel-framed rackets with quality string tension provide reliable performance for recreational play
PORTABLE DESIGN: Lightweight rackets paired with a yellow and black carrying case make this set perfect for on-the-go activities
IDEAL FOR BEGINNERS: Perfect starter kit for casual players looking to enjoy recreational badminton games with friends and family
SPECIFICATIONS: Set includes two red and black Wilson rackets with comfortable grip handles, shuttlecocks, and a branded carrying case
description: Get ready for exciting badminton matches with this complete Wilson 2 Player Badminton Set. This comprehensive kit includes everything you need to start playing right away - two durable rackets featuring Wilson's quality construction, shuttlecocks for consistent flight performance, and a convenient carry bag for easy transport and storage. The rackets sport a striking red design with robust string tension that provides excellent control and power for both recreational players and beginners. The included carrying bag, decorated in Wilson's signature yellow and black colours, makes it simple to take your game anywhere, from the garden to the beach or park. Perfect for family entertainment, casual matches with friends, or introducing newcomers to the sport of badminton. The lightweight yet sturdy construction of the rackets ensures comfortable handling during extended play sessions, while the included shuttlecocks are designed for optimal trajectory and speed.
